name: Ask mode
description: Clarify the problem, map tradeoffs, and prepare an implementation brief before editing code.
when: Ambiguous requirements, architecture decisions, request shaping

name: Code mode
description: Inspect the repo, make focused edits, and run the tightest meaningful verification.
when: Features, fixes, migrations, and scoped refactors

name: Review mode
description: Audit a change with findings first, ordered by risk instead of style commentary.
when: PRs, generated patches, release candidate checks

name: Cloud delegation
description: Break a larger task into bounded Codex jobs, worktrees, or sidecar passes with explicit ownership.
when: Parallelizable work that does not share a write scope

name: Automations
description: Schedule recurring Codex work with prompts, cadence, and guardrails that keep noise under control.
when: Daily triage, weekly release checks, recurring documentation audits
